 A cloak worn by the Wolf Trackers. It is noticeably frayed in places, likely from their constant wandering across Pywel in search of prey. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Wolf Tracker Cloth Cloak is a Cloak in Crimson Desert. Cloaks is an Armor type that is equipped on the shoulders of the player, although it does not grant any defense, it aids players with added effects such as Elemental Resistance, Critical Hit Chances, and more. These types of Armor can be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or defeating Enemies and Bosses.

### 
Where to Find the Witch

To begin using Abyss Cores, players need to progress through the main story until Chapter 5. During this chapter, the first Witch, Elowen, is introduced, and her lair can be found in The Witchwoods, west of the Hernand Highlands. After this point, additional Witches can also be encountered in other regions of Pywel, including one found in the Serpent Marsh, south of Demeniss. Reaching this part of the campaign is what fully opens up the Abyss Core system and allows players to start modifying their

Pets

[...] registering as your pet. Once registered, they will follow you as you journey through Pywel and assist you in Combat.

### 
How to Obtain Pets in Crimson Desert

You can obtain pets by building a strong bond with certain animals by gaining their trust. There are various methods for gaining their trust, such as petting them every time you encounter them, or giving them their favorite food. There will be a meter on the upper left corner of the screen that shows how many trust points you gain from interacting with the animal. Once you have reached the maximum trust level, you can press the button to take the animal and make it your new companion. You will be able to encounter this during the Faction quest, The Greymanes' New Fangs.

Vendors

[...] with unique names and are instead listed simply as Street Vendors, scattered across different areas and regions.

### 
Selling Items to Vendors in Crimson Desert

As mentioned earlier, you can sell unwanted items to vendors in exchange for copper or silver. This is a useful way to earn money and build trust, especially when you obtain items such as recipes. Once a recipe is learned, it is permanently recorded in your Knowledge Journal, meaning the item itself is no longer needed. In most cases, it’s best to sell the extra copy for additional copper or silver.

However, keep in mind that items you sell to a vendor will cost more if you decide to buy them back later. Another thing to note is that you can only repurchase that item from the same vendor you originally sold it to,

### Crafting Manuals | Crimson Desert Wiki

This page was last edited on 31 March 2026, at 01:43.From Crimson Desert Wiki

Crafting Manuals in Crimson Desert are key items that hold techniques and detailed information on crafting new Meals, Elixirs, Tools, and more. These items can be found scattered around different shops in the various towns in Pywel, or can be obtained as rewards for completing Quests. Each crafted item can benefit the player in different aspects, such as increasing health and stamina, removing ailments, or crafting required tools instead of needing to purchase them from Vendors.

These items can be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or by simply exploring Pywel.

Unique Weapons

Unique Weapons in Crimson Desert are rare and powerful armaments that can only be obtained once per playthrough, making them highly sought-after by players. These Weapons are typically acquired as drops from formidable bosses or as rewards for completing specific quests, and cannot be crafted through conventional means. Many Unique Weapons feature exclusive abilities that set them apart from standard equipment, offering distinct combat advantages and playstyle variations.

 
Additionally, some come pre-equipped with Abyss Gears in their slots, further enhancing their effectiveness and making them valuable additions to any build.

 
Note that this page is a WIP, and will be adding unique Weapons as they are found.

Varnian Dagger is a Dagger in Crimson Desert. Varnian Dagger is an exotic blade forged in the distant lands of Varnia, prized for its rarity and distinctive craftsmanship. Daggers are slightly large knives that players can use to perform sneak attacks or final attacks in quick succession to nearby Enemies.

### Black Sun

 A shield of Bastier, the grand general of Demeniss. Thick wrought iron was rimmed with gold-toned studs. It is built to soak up the impact of any onslaught and drive the frontline forward. 
Black Sun is a Shield in Crimson Desert. Black Sun is a shield of Bastier, the grand general of Demeniss. Shields are defensive equipment that players can use to block incoming attacks or to shove enemies to put distance during Combat.

NPCs

[...] it will yield +5 Trust and say "Your actions are liked", which will show up in the upper left corner of the screen.

### Gifting NPCs in Crimson Desert

 
 Gifting items to an NPC is another way to increase your Trust Reputation. When you approach an NPC, select the Gift action to open your inventory and view the items you currently have on hand. Only items that are not greyed out can be given as gifts. When you hover over an item, the amount of Trust you will gain from gifting it will appear in the upper left corner of the screen.

 
 

 
 Maximizing your trust allows you to receive special gifts or trigger unique events based on that character's disposition. Many different rewards await those who take the time to build meaningful connections across the NPCs you'll come across

Managing Supplies of Greymane Camp in Crimson Desert

Managed by Carl on the Base Camp, the Camp Supply Management can boost the growth of your Greymane Camp through donating funds and goods through "Support Camp Resources". Also, you can store acquired trade goods or packages, and load them onto your horse or wagon to sell them. If you missed any items or lost them by accident, you can also check the "Lost Item Recovery" option on the menu to reclaim them.

### Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

 
 
 - During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. You'll then have to complete the puzzle using Force Palm to activate the Abyss Cresset and acquire the Abyss Artifac

### 
Greymanes

 Warriors who safeguard Pailune.
People of diverse backgrounds and abilities have gathered as if by fate, taking on dangerous tasks others dare not accept. Though their foremost mission is to protect Pailune's peace, they extend a helping hand to anyone in need, and their renown now spreads across all of Pywel.
 

Greymanes is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Greymanes is a core faction associated with the Duchy of Hernand. They are warriors whose mission is to protect the peace of Pailune. ### Clear Soup (Recipe)
Field Pot Cooking 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 [Recipe]
Required Tool: Cooking Tool
Ingredients: Meat x1 + Grain x1 + Water x1
※ Meat: tough meat, lean meat, tender meat, etc.

Bruna is a Vendor in Crimson Desert. Bruna is a renowned artisan in Hernand. She is known for crafting stable gear that highlights the quality of leather. NPCs in Pywel provide various services or could give Quests to add to the story of the game. These NPCs can be found in various places and are a part of different houses and factions.

A saddler of Hernand. Catering primarily to the Hernand villagers, she crafts horse tack with the comfort of both horse and rider in mind. Lately, she has been wondering if her saddles need a special decorative touch to truly stand out.

### 
Poison Arrow

 
Projectile

 An arrow with a deadly poison applied to its tip. On impact, the victim is poisoned, steadily losing Health and slowly succumbing to death. Used when attacking with a bow equipped.
Poison Arrow is a Projectile in Crimson Desert. Poison Arrow is a projectile that inflicts Poison on enemies hit by attacks performed with a bow. These items are used as ammo for long-ranged Weapons, this allows players to deal damage to Enemies and Bosses from a safe distance. Projectiles can often be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, crafting at Smithys, or looting from Enemies.

Ambush

### Ambush

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Costs 10 Spirit 
Hold R1 while shooting Axiom Force to move instantly to the target enemy and strike. 
 
 
 
 Acquisition Requirement 
[Winch Lv 1]
 Abyss Artifact x1 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Ambush is a Skill in Crimson Desert. It is a skill that can be unlocked and equipped onto Kliff. Skills are active and passive abilities that players can use to modify or enhance a character's combat style and unlock methods of exploration. There are multiple ways to unlock and upgrade skills; some skills may be learned through exploration or from enemies in combat. Skills can also be upgraded using Abyss Artifacts found throughout Crimson Desert.

Grover is a Vendor in Crimson Desert. Grover is the head of the bank of Hernand located within the City of Hernand. NPCs in Pywel provide various services or could give Quests to add to the story of the game, these NPCs can be found in various places and are a part of different houses and factions.

### 
Haiden's Lesser Elixir (Recipe)
Lesser Elixirs

 [Crafting Method]
Required Tool: Cauldron
Materials: Lesser Spirit Reagent x2 + Lesser Catalyst x1 + Empty Bottle x1
※ Lesser Spirit Reagents: Green Sulphur Butterfly, Rosemary, Yellow Rosemary, etc.
※ Lesser Catalyst: Iron Ore, Copper Ore, Stone, etc.
[Effects]
Duration: 4 seconds
Effect: No Spirit Consumption
Drinking this elixir boosts your confidence for a period of time, letting you forget fear.

### 
Haldwin

 Region
Hernand
Location
Hernand Castle
Faction
House Celeste

Haldwin is a Vendor in Crimson Desert. Haldwin is the manager of the Hernand Contribution Shop located in Hernand Castle, serving under Duke Celeste and recording the achievements of those who aid the city. He takes pride in his flawless record, having never missed an entry or made a single mistake. NPCs in Pywel provide various services or could give Quests to add to the story of the game. These NPCs can be found in various places and are a part of different houses and factions.

House Grace

their generous support of the Emberwind Workshop's hot-cloudcarts. Thanks to the fertile lands under their care, their people live in prosperity. However, persistent rumors surrounding the Count's private life have begun to tarnish the family's reputation. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
House Grace is a Faction in Crimson Desert. House Grace is a core faction that hails from the southern Hernand. They are excellent caretakers of the fertile lands under their proprietorship, and as such, their people are also well taken care of. Factions can hold NPCs that occupy specific areas in Pywel, some can be blockaded by a hostile factions, while friendly factions may give you quests to help retake strongholds or with the residents' daily lives.

Hernandian Parish of Solumen

### Hernandian Parish of Solumen

 
 
 
 
 The Hernand parish of the Solumen Oder.
Though Hernand and Demeniss share an uneasy history, faith in Solumen serves as common ground between them. To prevent religion from being used as a political weapon, an independent Hernand parish was established, and the Demeniss Cathedral tacitly permitted it. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Hernandian Parish of Solumen is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Hernandian Parish of Solumen is a religious order that was established to serve as a common ground between Hernand and Demeniss. Factions can hold NPCs that occupy specific areas in Pywel, some can be blockaded by a hostile factions, while friendly factions may give you quests to help retake strongholds or with the residents' daily lives.

 Tool 
 
 
 
 
 Fishing Cooldown Reduction Lv 
 1

### Crimson Desert Scholastone Institute Faction Guide

 
 
 - Scholastone Institute is one of the factions where the player can conduct projects through its Research Institute. Researching Projects allow the player to acquire blueprints, crafting manuals, or recipes, learn how to craft unique pieces of equipment, increase mount (Cloudcart) efficiency, enhance the maximum Stat level for Health, and more.
 
 - Research Projects for Scholastone Institute become available after completing the main quest category Forbidden Knowledge in Chapter 4.

Iron Ore

### Iron Ore

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A silvery-gray metal ore. Tough, yet easy to process, it's commonly used as a refinement material for weapons, nails, and basic components. You'll often spot it in exposed seams along cliff faces and near quarries. 
Iron Ore is a Gatherable Item in Crimson Desert. These items are essential materials used for crafting and refining equipment, cooking meals, and brewing potions. Gatherables can often be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or defeating Enemies and Bosses.

 
 

 
 
 A silvery-gray metal ore. Tough, yet easy to process, it's commonly used as a refinement material for weapons, nails, and basic components. You'll often spot it in exposed seams along cliff faces and near quarries.

Bosses

### Bosses's Attack Types in Crimson Desert

 
 There are a few common offensive mechanics that you will easily notice while in combat with Bosses. The most basic one would be their Primary Attack, which is an offensive move that bosses use the most often in combat, and in most cases do not take much time to recover. These attacks come out swiftly, and won't give you much time to counterattack and the best defensive moves that you can do is to block it with your shield, or evade it through side step or back slide away from the foe. 

 
 Another common offensive technique would be the Heavy Attack, where the boss takes a bit of time to charge their offensive move and attempt to strike you with a powerful blow, inflicting massive damage. A good counter measure to take note of with He

Damiane Skills

[...] an inner skill that players can learn. These inner skills will allow you to modify and enhance your playthrough.

### How do Skills Work in Crimson Desert?

 
 Skills in Crimson Desert are equippable abilities that can be used to modify or improve playstyle. Skills can be acquired through multiple means, and once learned, they can be used by pressing a combination of buttons. Additionally, there are skills that, once acquired, can be enhanced multiple times. This upgrades the level of the skill and allows you to learn sub-branches of that particular move. Players should also take note that active skills will have a corresponding cost, either in Spirit or Stamina.

Kearush the Slayer

[...] After successfully dodging this attack, get close to Kearush as quickly as you can and perform your powerful blows.

### Ground and Pound Attack

 
The Ground and Pound Attack will start with Kearush beating his chest, then slamming the ground using both of his hands, afterwards, performing a continuous rampaging smash attacks. This is one of Kearush's deadliest attacks, which can inflict serious damage on your health. When you see Kearush beat his chest, use that as your indicator to get away from him as quickly as you can so you can avoid taking damage. Once you have successfully avoided this attack, try to get close to Kearush and use your quick attacks to at least inflict some damage on his health.

Merchants

How to Obtain / Where to Find:
can be found at the Hernand Equipment Shop in the City of Hernand, just outside Tina's Tailor Shop.
 
 
 An equipment vendor of Hernand. Blessed with talented hands from a young age, he became a master of ironwork, earning the moniker "The Artist of Iron." He is constantly on the search for high-quality minerals to forge even better equipment. 
 
 
 
 Tina 
 
 
 - Tina can be found inside the Hernand Tailor's Shop in the City of Hernand.
 
 
 A tailor of Hernand. With mastery honed over years of running the shop, she satisfies customers with both traditional and modern styles. Recently, she pulled an all-nighter to perfect a single, specially ordered hat. 
 
 
 
 Alden 
 
 
 - Alden can be found in Hernand Provisioner's Shop in the City of Hernand.

How to Unlock Imbue Element

### How to Unlock Magic Skills?

 
 Unlocking Magic Skills in Crimson Desert has a different approach compared to the other skills, where you can observe or use an Abyss Artifact to unlock. Players will first need to head over to an element's corresponding Spire and complete it to unlock an area of the Abyss. 

 
 
 - Lightning - Spire of the Stars
 
 - Flame & Frost - Spire of Ringing Truth
 
 - Wind - Spire of Clockwork
 
 
 Starting with the Spire of the Stars, which can be accessed during Chapter 4 at Scholastone, players will need to complete the puzzles inside the Spire to gain access to new areas inside the Abyss. Inside, players will then have to traverse various areas and complete the puzzles inside the Abyss to unlock Lightning and its corresponding e

Recovery Items in Crimson Desert are a vital category of items that provide immediate benefits to Kliff. These items have various purposes, such as increasing Kliff's health, temporarily boosting stats, or temporarily enhancing combat effectiveness. While Recovery Items are only a single use item, they can be quite common to come across such as purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or by crafting them.

### Crafting and Upgrading in Crimson Desert

 
 The aspect of crafting in Crimson Desert goes beyond crafting Consumables and Equipment, as you can experience cooking up big meals that replenish your health, your spirit, and your stamina, and also brew up medicine and potions to give you temporary buffs and to heal your ailments. There are various means of obtaining Resources for crafting these different items. For crafting Weapons, you can look for any Blacksmith in town or at the Greymane Camp, provided you have the required materials to do so. How to Unlock Imbue Element

### How to Unlock Magic Skills?

 
 Unlocking Magic Skills in Crimson Desert has a different approach compared to the other skills, where you can observe or use an Abyss Artifact to unlock. Players will first need to head over to an element's corresponding Spire and complete it to unlock an area of the Abyss. 

 
 
 - Lightning - Spire of the Stars
 
 - Flame & Frost - Spire of Ringing Truth
 
 - Wind - Spire of Clockwork
 
 
 Starting with the Spire of the Stars, which can be accessed during Chapter 4 at Scholastone, players will need to complete the puzzles inside the Spire to gain access to new areas inside the Abyss. Inside, players will then have to traverse various areas and complete the puzzles inside the Abyss to unlock Lightning and its corresponding e

All Abyss Artifact Locations

[...] Sealed Abyss Artifact. This place can also be reached by heading northeast of Pororin Village. [See Crimon Desert Map]

### Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

 
 
 - During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. You'll then have to complete the puzzle using Force Palm to activate the Abyss Cresset and acquire the Abyss Artifac

### 
Crimson Desert - Boss Fights

Over on Crimson Desert's X account, the developers show off a couple of gameplay videos of bosses and how intense the battles can get when fighting against them. One of the bosses, called the White Horn, which resembles a giant white-furred ape with antlers and a long, silky tail, is said to have taken some children from a nearby settlement, and the player is tasked with bringing those kids back. Its quick and aggressive attacks leave no room for error. It can hide itself in the blizzard before charging at the player. It's shown in the video that players are able to climb and grab hold on to these lumbering enemies

White Horn

and knock down your character, which will be at your disadvantage as you cannot afford to be disabled even for a second when battling this boss.

Though the White Horn has an aggressive combat mechanic and a gigantic figure with attacks that seem to inflict lots of damage, there is one noticeable weakness in this boss. His attacks commonly take time to recover, and it has a slow turning rate. This is where your agile actions come into play. Throughout the fight, it is best to maximize your side step to attack the White Horn as much as possible from its side or rear. You can also backslide to a safe distance while the White Horn does an Arm Swing Ground Pound, or Impale, then re-engage as it recovers from its attack. This offensive strategy should knock down the White Horn effic

Go to Hernand Castle

Once inside, head past the training yard and Contribution Shop, and through the inner castle gate.

### 
Where to Find the Witch

To begin using Abyss Cores, players need to progress through the main story until Chapter 5. During this chapter, the first Witch, Elowen, is introduced, and her lair can be found in The Witchwoods, west of the Hernand Highlands. After this point, additional Witches can also be encountered in other regions of Pywel, including one found in the Serpent Marsh, south of Demeniss. Reaching this part of the campaign is what fully opens up the Abyss Core system and allows players to start modifying their

### Key Items | Crimson Desert Wiki

(Redirected from Quest Items)This page was last edited on 31 March 2026, at 01:42.From Crimson Desert Wiki

Key Items in Crimson Desert are a unique type of Item that players can use to progress the main storyline of the game. Key Items can be obtained through various means such as purchasing from Vendors, given by NPCs, completing Quests, or simply by exploring Pywel. Though oftentimes, Key Items are only used once and are commonly used to unlock areas, open pathways, solve puzzles, or trigger specific events.

Fishball Soup (Recipe)

Ingredients: Grain x2 + Vegetable x1 + Fish Fillet x2 + Salt x1 + Water x3

### 
Find a way into the building

There will be discs located to the right of the path leading up to the building. With the use of Axiom Force, you will have to complete the circuit by rotating the correct piece to get power flowing to the rest of the discs. You only need to fix these two discs; the rest of the discs are already fixed. Click on the Left Analog Stick to use Axiom Force on the discs, and use the Right Analog Stick to manipulate them. There will be a blue light emanating from the lines found on the discs; these indicate where the power is surging through. Get the power flowing to reach the building. ### 
Goldleaf Merchant Guild

 The largest merchant guild in Hernand, run by goblins. Their influence stretches beyond Hernand across all of Pywel. If a deal is profitable, they prioritize gain over question of right and wrong. Widely seen as the embodiment of goblin materialism, they are also rumored to be rife with fierce internal power struggles.

### Crafting and Cooking in Crimson Desert

 
 Crafting in Crimson Desert lets players make many kinds of useful items, not just Weapons and Armor. You can craft Equipment, Consumables, Tools, and other special items by using materials found across Pywel. These resources can be gathered by mining, chopping trees, hunting, fishing, or collecting plants, and they can also be bought from merchants, blacksmiths, and other vendors. Because of this, crafting is an important part of both progression and survival.

 
 Cooking is a simple but important part of crafting in Crimson Desert. Players can cook meals and drinks at bonfires or camp using ingredients found in the world or bought from shops. These dishes can restore Health, Spirit, and Stamina, and some also provide extra benefits tha

### 
House Celeste

 The ducal house that governs Hernand.
Distant descendants of the wandering knight Canta, they bear the heavy responsibility of defending the duchy and protecting its people. As multiple factions rise to threaten Hernand, they are now being tested to see whether they can truly uphold that duty.

House Celeste is a Faction in Crimson Desert. House Celeste is a core faction that governs the region of Hernand. They bear the responsibility of protecting the duchy and its people. ### 
House Roberts

 The count's house of Hernand.
A long-established merchant family, they rank among the wealthiest in Hernand. They mingle with high-ranking nobles and figures in the arts, hosting lavish banquets. Yet due to a noble rivalry with House Felix, invitations are never extended to that family.

House Roberts is a Faction in Crimson Desert. House Roberts is a distinguished faction that hails from the City of Hernand. They are one of the wealthiest families in the city and have connections with nobles and personalities in the arts. Sword of Trials III is a Challenge in Crimson Desert. Sword of Trials III is a Mastery challenge in which the player must defeat three enemies in a single encounter, wielding a sword without taking any damage. Challenges in Crimson Desert are objectives that the player can start by obtaining Sealed Abyss Artifacts, exploring regions, or progressing through the game. When completed, Challenges can provide players with unique rewards and features.

Battered Meat And Fish

### Battered Meat And Fish

 
 
 
 Provisions 
 
 
 
 Health: +240.0
Fire Resistance Lv 4 (1 min) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Sells for 
 31
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Various ingredients have been lightly coated in Egg and pan-fried to perfection. Its vibrant colors and rich flavors make it a centerpiece for any feast. 
Battered Meat And Fish is a Recovery Item in Crimson Desert. Battered Meat And Fish is a provision that restores Health and grants Fire Resistance for a short time. Recovery Items are items that players can use to provide immediate benefits to their characters. While it is commonly a single-use item, they can often be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or crafting them.

Walkthrough

[...] as you complete them, to unlock the aforementioned quest. We'll go through these one at a time as fast as possible.

### Bloomwood Ranch

 
 Starting with Missing Companion, we'll be heading over to Bloomwood Ranch, where a crying child by the name of Willian is asking for help finding his lost sheep. After speaking with Willian, speak with the men and the children to find out more about what happened. The men will mention a bandit camp across the Nas River. Head south to Nas River Fishing Dock, crossing over to the Nas Riverside, where there will be a group of bandits camped. Unfamiliar Lands is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. Unfamiliar Lands is the first quest in your adventure throughout Pywel. This quest takes place after surviving a Black Bear ambush, and the surviving Greymanes are burying their dead. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

New Journey is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. Someone by the name of Sebastian has pulled Kliff out of his watery grave and managed to treat his wounds. Kliff now wishes to pay back some of the hospitality. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

Characters

### Crimson Desert Characters Tips For NEW Players

 
 There are three characters featured in the game, Kliff, Damiane, and Oongka. Kliff is the main protagonist who drives the main campaign, which you probably already know, while Damiane and Oongka are secondary playable characters. Damiane is unlocked, while becomes playable towards the end of chapter 7. Each character specializes in wielding weapons and wearing armor.

 
 
 - Kliff specializes in using one-handed swords that are paired with a medium or large shield, and his ranged weapon of choice is the bow.
 
 - Damiane is an expert in wielding a rapier with a small shield, and she can use firearms such as pistols.
 
 - Oongka, on the other hand, prefers to use a great axe, and hand cannon.

Stamina

### Crimson Desert Stamina Stats Information

 
 
 - Sprinting and performing certain actions consume Stamina. You cannot use skills if you do not have enough stamina.
 
 - Defending against enemy attacks also consumes Stamina.
 
 - Blocking heavy attack results in higher Stamina consumption; if your Stamina is fully depleted while guarding, your defense will break, and you will take damage.
 
 - Certain equipment effects can reduce the Stamina consumed by defending.
 
 - To increase Stamina, players can invest in Research Institutions, allowing them to learn more about specialized technologies from certain regions. You will need to complete the related research projects in the Crimson Desert to max out your Stamina after reaching the threshold. The related project is called Red S

Character Customization

### 
How to Use Dye in Crimson Desert

Once you have the dye, you can visit the Dyehouse vendor and choose the dye option to dye any piece of equipment of your choosing. There are a total of 10 dye colors you can obtain, with a total of 110 shades to choose from. However, not all dye colors and shades will be unlocked, so you will need to obtain them by either purchasing the dye, or by crafting or finding them on your journey. Visit the dyehouse again to see the colors or shades you have unlocked.

A dyehouse can easily be spotted in the outskirts of a town or village, colorful fabric can be found hanging outside their shop. However, you may a

Stats

swimming. Also, don’t neglect to upgrade Spirit, as you’ll need some “MP” to use some unique skills that are vital in both combat and exploration.

 
Aside from the primary stats, each of the playable characters also has another set of stats that determine their Attack damage and Attack Speed, Critical Rate, Movement Speed, Defense, and Resistances to elements like Fire, Ice, and Lightning. As you progress, your characters will also earn stat modifiers that affect their Trade Good Profit, Damage Reduction, passive Stamina Regen, and others.

Status Effects

[...] foes or to strengthen the playable character, other status effects may affect other combat and exploration abilities.

### 
Climate Changes in Crimson Desert

The Climate and the temperature can change depending on the time and region in Pywel, your body temperature may also change depending on the environment. If you stand by a fire, your body temperature will increase, and you may burn if you are close to the fire. While in the cold, your body temperature will drop and move slower. You can see your body temperature on the colored bar to the right of the minimap on the lower left of the screen. If your body temperature goes too far from the optimal range, your stamina will start to drain quicker, and you will get exhausted faster and recovery slower.

Forest of Trickery is a Faction Quest in Crimson Desert. ### Talk to Dahlia

 
After completing Serge's Request, a Dahlia's Poster will be available on the Notice Board, or Dahlia will be requesting this quest if you go to Hernand Inn. When you find yourself in the City of Hernand Inn, talk to Dahlia. She will tell you that there's a man who hasn't paid his bill for a few nights at Hernand Inn. Dahlia will also inform you that the man works at a nearby stable and has been dodging her payment requests. She will ask you to get the payment from the man, and this will lead to your next quest objective.

Prox came across a counterfeit product, and he wanted to send it to the investigator, along with his created list of names who transacted with him. Palmar Pill is a Recovery Item in Crimson Desert. Palmar Pill allows you to resurrect in the same spot where you died, while restoring health partially. Recovery Items are items that players can use to provide immediate benefits to their characters. While it is commonly a single-use item, they can often be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or crafting them.

 The healer in Sunset Valley needs herbs, as the patients' condition are very serious

### Talk to the healer

 
When you reach Sunset Valley, southwest of the City of Hernand, and talk to Freidis, the healer of the village, you will receive this quest. You can use the nearby Abyss Cresset to fast travel to Sunset Valley. Freidis will tell you that the villagers are in desperate need of help; they need to get a Satintail Root to cure their sickness, but they don't have the manpower to do so. He will ask you to fetch some Satintail Root while he attends to the patients in the village. You will receive your next quest objective after talking to Freidis.

Sanctum of Benediction (Quest)

[...] the hidden door near the two pillars. You will acquire the Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom once you open the chest.

### Cleansing the Sanctum of Benediction

 
After liberating the Sanctum of Benediction from the Antumbra Order, you have to look for the missing Fusion Reactor Core: XIII-I and Fusion Reactor Core V. To find the Fusion Reactor Core: XIII-I, you have to find the hidden room around the sanctum. You can find the Fusion Reactor Core: XIII-I, where you find the treasure chest. Get to the western side of the sanctum and look for two pillars and a fire post. Once you have located them, you have to use your Blinding Flash to light up the fire post to open the hidden door. Grab the Fusion Reactor using your Axiom Force.

Gate to the Otherworld

then begin his presentation proving his research. Your first task after his speech will be to activate the lock device switch located underground. To do that, you'll have to go to the cave located below and interact with the hatch, which shows 9 strongbox components that light up along with some of the others when pushed. Your goal will be to have all of them light up. You can achieve this by pressing the top left, bottom right, top right, bottom left, then the center buttons. If you've already meddled with the puzzle, you can exit to reset it. Once you've solved it, it'll reveal a handle; operating this handle will activate the lock device switch. A cutscene will play where you'll see Octavius's experiment bloom like a flower, exposing its inner workings.

Polar Opposites

[...] your arm and gives you a power that she mentions can help get you inside. You have now received the Axiom Force skill

### Find a way into the building

 
There will be discs located to the right of the path leading up to the building. With the use of Axiom Force, you will have to complete the circuit by rotating the correct piece to get power flowing to the rest of the discs. You only need to fix these two discs; the rest of the discs are already fixed. Click on the Left Analog Stick to use Axiom Force on the discs, and use the Right Analog Stick to manipulate them. There will be a blue light emanating from the lines found on the discs; these indicate where the power is surging through. Get the power flowing to reach the building. [...] and Madness
 
 - Next Main Quest: Double-sided Invitation
 
 - Quest Chapter: Chapter 4: The Price of Knowledge

### Speak with Grundir

 
After falling from The Abyss, you fall back to Scholastone Institute, where Grundir and his peers spot you falling from the sky. You tell him about seeing Octavius in the Abyss and about him asking you to stop whoever was responsible for the opening of the rift. You also tell him about seeing a man who spoke as if he knew you before getting tossed from the Abyss and ending up back at the institute. Grundir says he must uncover the man's identity and determine his purpose in the Abyss. He says he'll postpone all experiments related to the Abyss and that he'll focus all his resources on locating Octavius and that strange man.

Where Rumors Gather

town.

 
 

 
You'll find a Jindo and White Dog close to the wrecked carriages by Bluemont Manor, pet them to add their breeds to your knowledge. There will also be a notice board in front of Bluemont Manor with requests from Renee and Turnali. Rhett's poster request will eventually be on the Notice Board for Kliff to pick up. Either grab and examine the posters or speak to either of the quest givers to accept their requests. Head into the Hernand Inn, which is located just southeast of the Hernand Bank, next to the Tailor's Shop and the Equipment Shop to the east. You may visit these shops to either buy and sell items or simply expand your knowledge on available items in the game by hovering over their wares, as most of these will be shown as ??? in the beginning.

[...] Key that the noble gave you during the True Wisdom in Kindness quest. This will prompt you to go to Hernand Castle.

### Go to Hernand Castle

 
Once you have the Hernandian Attire from the Actions Speak Louder than Words quest, equip it and approach the guards at the gate of Hernand Castle. They will quickly inspect you and let you through. Make sure to equip the Hernandian Attire, or else you'll rewatch the initial interaction with the guards. Once inside, head past the training yard and Contribution Shop, and through the inner castle gate. 

 
 

 
 

 
Make your way into the main citadel and head up the staircase located immediately to your right as you enter the building. Once you're up on the top of the staircase, head into the next room, connecting to a grand hal

Abyss without Balance

and make your way to the first floating island. This will involve a lot of platforming and ledge-grabbing, so be careful with your traversal.

 
 

 
Upon reaching the first floating island, you'll come across what seems to be a dead end, but that is not the case; there will be a slow-moving platform moving diagonally from your pillar up to the next floating island diagonally. Remain calm and wait for the platform to make its way back to your location. After that, there will be another one just like it. Just wait for the platform, then head on up to the next part.

 
 

 
 

 
Once you've made your way up past that second slow-moving platform, turn right and step on the Ethereal Pathway to continue. Once you've teleported across, continue jumping across the floating

### Exploring the Top Floor of the Lioncrest Watchtower

 
This quest begins once you have reached the top floor of the Watchtower, where you will find some boxes, books, chests, and an interesting Helm. A small chest can be found to the right of the Helm by some boxes, you will need to wear a disguise in order to have the option to steal from this chest. Equip a mask and open the chest to obtain x1 Iron Ore, x2 Stone, x1 Light Copper Pouch. Doing so will decrease your Hernandian Contribution EXP by 5.

The Flames of Greed

[...] the group, take your mount and make your way to Windland Heights, by Unicorn Cliff southeast of the Goldleaf Tradepost.

### The Burning House

 
When you arrive at the burning house, you will see several people standing outside the house and crying. Approach the house to begin the cutscene, and you'll discover that they need help rescuing someone inside the home. Once you gain control of Kliff again, a timer will appear on the screen giving you 120 seconds to save the man inside. Use Nature's Grasp to move the log that is blocking the doorway, set them down next to the house. Hop over the second log by the doorway and enter the house.

Bleed Bandits

all across Hernand with alarming speed. A powerful and shadowy force supports their rapid rise, making their activities more difficult to suppress. They addict people to Dreamer's Bliss, a drug that induces harrowing nightmares, and enslave them in the process. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Bleed Bandits is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Bleed Bandits is a hostile faction with influence spreading all over Hernand. They also peddle a drug called Dreamer's Bliss, which they use to capture and enslave their targets. Factions can hold NPCs that occupy specific areas in Pywel, some can be blockaded by a hostile factions, while friendly factions may give you quests to help retake strongholds or with the residents' daily lives.

Abyss Core

### How to Use Crimson Desert Abyss Cores

 
 Abyss Cores are an important part of equipment customization in Crimson Desert, as they let players tailor their gear to different combat needs and playstyles. A well-placed core can significantly improve the usefulness of a weapon or armor piece, making them valuable for both early progression and more specialized builds later on. Because inventory space is limited, players may find themselves collecting Abyss Cores before they can actually use them, making it worthwhile to unlock access to the proper vendor as soon as possible.

 
 Players cannot install Abyss Cores on their own. To use them, you must visit a Witch, a special merchant who handles all Abyss Core-related functions. Witches can install cores into your gear, remove ex

Rock Paper Scissors 
The Rock Paper Scissors can be found at the City of Hernand in the region of Hernand. 
Somewhere in the village, a child looks around for someone to play Rock, Paper, Scissors with. Scissors beat paper, rock beats scissors, and paper beats rock. The first to win two of three rounds becomes the victor.

 How to Play Rock Paper Scissors:

 
 
 - Scissors beat Paper, Rock beats Scissors, and Paper beats Rock.
 
 - Win two out of three rounds to claim ultimate victory.
 
 - Predict your opponent's moves and seize the win.
 
 - Before you play, it is recommended to manually save the game if you want to reload for a rematch.
 
 - If you don't win the first round or if yo

Rock Paper Scissors

depending on the actual time of the day in the game.
 
 
Enjoy a quick game of Rock Paper Scissors - How to Play and Win "Rock, Paper, Scissors":

 
 
 - Scissors beat Paper, Rock beats Scissors, and Paper beats Rock.
 
 - Win two out of three rounds to claim ultimate victory.
 
 - Predict your opponent's moves and seize the win.
 
 - Before you play, it is recommended to manually save the game if you want to reload for a rematch.
 
 - If you don't win the first round or if you want to secure winning the first round, you can leave to stop playing, and then interact with the child to start again.
 
 - The game will only end if either player wins two out of three rounds.

Subcontent:Lifeforms 6 Mysterious Cabin

strange animal resembling a small white rabbit. It has large, pointed ears and hops around on its uniquely shaped two legs. It is unknown when or where it first appeared in Pywel. Agile and mischievous, it is considered a symbol of fortune and joy.
Kuku Bird
Heteromorphs
A strange bird that cannot fly. In its original habitat, there are no predators, so flying is inefficient, and as a result, its wings have become smaller. Even so, the kuku bird's shrunken wings help it maintain basic balance.
Woodland Spirit
Magical Beings
Woodland spirits are tall guardians of nature, embodying woodland wisdom and strength. With massive, bark- covered bodies, branch-like limbs, and deep voices, these beings echo through the forest. They protect the flora and fauna

Subcontent:NPCs 1 Hernand

skill that could rival even Grimnir's.
Irkyn
- Irkyn can be found in the Kilnden Workshop during the quest Kiln Repair at the Kilnden Workshop.
Kuku pot artisan's assistant. While he possesses the talent to become a great artisan himself, his skills have yet to flourish, leaving him unable to repair the workshop's kiln. He is currently studying under Grimnir, but he still has a long and difficult road ahead of him.
Nork
- Nork can be found managing the Equipment Shop in Kharonso.
An equipment vendor of Kharonso. By blending traditional crafting techniques with academic knowledge, he produces gear that is both durable and sophisticated. The beeswax used to finish the equipment is sourced from a nearby apiary.
Devan
- Devan can be found in Ivynook during the quest

Subcontent:NPCs 2 Pailune

base of Beighen during the quest Rekindled Hope, where you'll need to convince one of the guards to let you head down through the secret passage.

- Torstein can be found inside the Pailune Castle during the quest Resolution.

- Torstein can be found inside one of the houses within Svinholt Ranch during the quest The Counterattack.
The Chief of Beighen and the leader of the Blue Fangs. He may be a stubborn man, but his bravery and honesty has earned the villagers' trust. He once served as the vice captain of Jian's guard, and he has known the Greymanes since they were young. He is always prepared to sacrifice his life to protect Pailune.
Shane
- Shane can be found tied up inside one of the houses within the City of Pailune during the quest Driving out the Shadows

Alustin
- Alustin can be first encountered disguised as a Beggar located in the City of Hernand during the quest Mysterious Man.

- Alustin will be encountered and reveal his true self once you reach the Axiom Archive.
One of the four beings maintaining the balance of the Abyss. Known in Pywel as an alchemist of Hernand Castle, he is in truth an ancient figure of mysterious power. As the overseer of the Axiom Archive in the Abyss, he meets Kliff - who has long watched over the balance between the Abyss and the ground - and he seeks his help.

Sugar Beet

Horse Item
Horse Feed

 A root vegetable with a red flesh hidden beneath a rough skin. It is a favored treat among horses thanks to its distinctive crisp texture and sweet flavor. And it provides a small Health recovery effect.
Sugar Beet is a Horse Item in Crimson Desert. Horse Items are items that are specifically for your Horse mount, these items include consumables and gear for your horse.

Sweet Taste of Bounties is a Faction Quest in Crimson Desert. Yann wanted to do some bounty hunting with you. Accompany Yann on catching the bounty. Faction Quests are optional quests that players can complete to increase their relationship with a specific Faction and gain XP and various rewards.

Yann has been pacing in front of the bounty notice for quite some time.

### 
Activate the Skybridge

Once you've finished those 2 puzzles, you will have successfully activated the Spire of Soaring, and the top of it will open up, and the platform will begin ascending towards the Crescent Skybridge. Your next task will be to activate the Skybridge. Wait for the platform to reach its destination. Once it does, step on the Abyss Nexus in front of you so that you'll have an easy way back if you happen to fall back to Pywel. In front of you will be a sphere, glowing yellow. Grab on to it with Axiom Force, and you'll hear it charging up. Once you're prompted, point the beam at the circle that appears on the other side. Climb up

### 
Crimson Desert Trukan the Ascended Note, Tips & Trivia

- Optional Boss: No

- Trukan the Ascended only has one HP bar. Most of his attacks also have a chance of knocking down opponents.

- Before combat, it is recommended to do preparation and bring a lot of HP recovery items. If you also have stashed a Palmar Pill, it may come handy incase you get slain in combat.

- It is recommended to visit an Anvil and a Grind Stone if there is one nearby. This will help you get temporary buffs on your equipped armor and weapon, making your defense tougher and dealing more damage. You can check our Interactive Map for a list of Anvil and Grind Stone near

Demeniss Castle

Valentine is a Vendor in Crimson Desert. Valentine is the manager of the Demeniss Castle Contribution Shop. He is responsible for maintaining transparent records of the contributions made by the Demeniss elite. NPCs in Pywel provide various services or could give Quests to add to the story of the game. ### 
Vellua Fishermen's Guild

 A seaside village in southern Hernand. Thanks to bountiful waters teeming with fish, fishermen have long flocked here, keeping the town vibrant and full of life. However, that same abundance made it a frequent target for pirate raids, to the point where rebuilding has become part of daily life. Now, the residents simply long for a humble and peaceful existence.

Vellua Fishermen's Guild is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Vellua Fishermen's Guild can be found in a village nestled near the bountiful seaside teeming with fish, located in southern Hernand. Factions can hold NPCs that occupy specific areas in Pywel, som

Wolf Trackers

 A roaming band that scours Pywel in search of prey.
They are not hunters who give thanks to nature, but butchers addicted to the thrill of slaughter. They roam in search of ever more stimulating quarry, and recently they have been tearing across Pywel to track down the whereabouts of the wolf spoken like a legend.

Wolf Trackers is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Wolf Trackers is a hostile faction that travels in groups across Pywel, searching for prey. ### Crimson Desert Interactive Map

 
 The Crimson Desert Full Map is an interactive tracker and checklist for all things related to Crimson Desert. Follow alongside Kliff as he journeys through Pywel with Oongka, Damiane, and the rest of his Greymane comrades. This Crimson Desert Interactive Map guides players in navigating through the various regions in Pywel, from aiding Factions in completing their Quests to indulging in Minigames with the locals. There are several items that you may find in order to craft various items, such as meals, equipment, tools, and more, that contribute to the player's exploration.

Interactive Map

### Crimson Desert Interactive Map

 
 The Crimson Desert Full Map is an interactive tracker and checklist for all things related to Crimson Desert. Follow alongside Kliff as he journeys through Pywel with Oongka, Damiane, and the rest of his Greymane comrades. This Crimson Desert Interactive Map guides players in navigating through the various regions in Pywel, from aiding Factions in completing their Quests to indulging in Minigames with the locals. There are several items that you may find in order to craft various items, such as meals, equipment, tools, and more, that contribute to the player's exploration.

### 
Put fuel into the kiln

Approach the kiln located northwest of the ancient generator. The fuel you'll be looking for is these electrified spheres. You'll need 5 of these: 2 are by the kiln itself, and the other 3 you'll have to look for nearby. They glow blue, making them fairly easy to spot. One will be at the foot of the mound where the kiln is, another by a storm drain to the south, and the last one's on the ruined statue. Grab these with Axiom Force and place them inside the kiln through the open ports seen on the exterior. After you've placed all four fuel spheres inside the kiln, use the wooden lever to activate the kiln

The Mysterious Pot

[...] excited about the pot's completion. He'll point to the stone pillar and ask you to fetch it yourself from the chamber.

### 
Obtain the mysterious pot

Interact with the stone pillar with the yellow lever and push it to the other side to open the chamber and obtain the Kuku Iron Pot. The quest ends upon picking up the Kuku Iron Pot.

Disturbance at the Arena

[...] He got drunk and interrupted the finals of the fighting pits, and the people in charge are asking for compensation.

### 
Win three times at the arena

Upon arriving at the Goldenfist Arena, approach the Goldleaf Private Soldiers, and a cutscene will start. The guard mentions that Yann cost them large sums of coin. The guards suggest that you get into the arena and get the crowd into a betting frenzy to make up for the lost coin. You'll only need to beat 3 NPCs in a fist fight, strictly no swords or any kind of weapons or special moves allowed. Approach the host to start your first fight; you will need 30 copper to participate, though. You'll be fighting against Wandering Freeswords of varying skill, so be a bit cautious in your bouts. After beating 3 oppone

Skilled in Archery

[...] competing against a Hernand Guard with intermediate skill. You'll merely have to hit 10 targets faster than they can.

### 
Speak with Duane

After winning the competition, head back to Duane and speak with him about your win. He'll be thrilled about your win and the opportunity to gloat in front of Naira. The quest concludes after Kliff and Duane part ways.

 A massive blaster once wielded by Ravok. It was the weapon of choice for the leader of the Savage Fangs, a nomadic bandit clan from the Crimson Desert. It is crude to the point of recklessness, yet boasts immense power.

### 
Howling Hill

 A hill overlooking all of Hernand. While wolves are rare now, legends say they once gathered here every night, their howls driving off nearby bandits. Since they rarely attacked livestock or villagers, it's said the people felt as though the wolves were actually protecting Hernand.

### 
Bleed Bandits

 An armed faction that has plunged Hernand into fear. Their influence spread all across Hernand with alarming speed. A powerful and shadowy force supports their rapid rise, making their activities more difficult to suppress. They addict people to Dreamer's Bliss, a drug that induces harrowing nightmares, and enslave them in the process.

Bleed Bandits is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Bleed Bandits is a hostile faction with influence spreading all over Hernand. ### 
Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

- During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. You'll then have to complete the puzzle using Force Palm to activate the Abyss Cresset and acquire the Abyss Artifact. For

Mounts Guide

### Mounts Guide in Crimson Desert

 
The first mount will quickly become available in the Prologue, while doing the mission New Journey, where you will ride the Herspia to the City of Hernand. The Herspia is a standard horse breed that does not offer anything fancy, but is reliable enough to take you quickly to far-off areas. While riding the horse, you will also have access to actions to accelerate, gallop, or trample, allowing you to engage in horseback combat or flee from dangerous encounters. Your horse does take damage and if their health drops to a certain threshold, they will not be able to accelerate or move quickly. When this happens, you can use the skill Force Palm and aim at its body to restore its health and continue riding. Mounts, specifically Horses, also gai

All Bell Locations

as you ring the bell. Some bells can be interacted with easily, but there are also other bells that will require you to meet specific conditions.

 
 

 
Unlocking the related quest will also require to you to find and ring the first bell. The first bell that you can find is in the northern area of Hernand. As soon as you arrive here, you'll notice the young boy Rulupee calling out to his pet companion. Once you get to the top of the tower, there you can interact with the bell to ring it, which will then start the quest Toll of Pywel, and complete the related mission Toll of Hernand. The rest of the quests are also similar, all you need to do is to ring the bell, and the quest will be completed.

New Game Plus

[...] and complete all main quests. Though this will take a long time, it can definitely be achieved in one playthrough.

### Replayability in Crimson Desert

 
 Replaying Crimson Desert allows you to experiment more in the second run. Such as causing more trouble around settlements, approaching combat differently, and more. However, since this is a new run, you will not have the items and skills obtained from your previous run, making the new run completely barebones.

The Missing Seal

[...] After reading the letter, you'll receive the Core Blueprint: Haste, 1 Diamond, 1 False Starwort, and an Abyss Cell.

### Go meet the witch

 
Head to the Witch of Wisdom at Meshley Trapsmith over at The Witchwoods, southwest of the City of Hernand. Assuming you've already activated it, you can use the Abyss Nexus by The Witchwoods to get there faster. If you're coming from the Abyss Nexus, head southeast. Once you reach the house, you will encounter three bandits who are planning to loot the house for treasures. Defeat the bandits, then go to the house on the right, but be careful with the spikes that will come out of the entrance of the house.

Pororin Forest Guardians

### Pororin Forest Guardians

 
 
 
 
 A village hidden deep within the forest, shielded from the eyes.
The Shai and the Fadus live there in happiness among flowers that bloom throughout the year, yet sorrow marks its past. After a scholar, driven by greed upon hearing rumors of the village's mystery, attempted to abduct a Shai, its people sealed their gates and closed themselves off from the outside world.

Antumbra's Sword

[...] NPCs found in town. You can also use a Grind Stone and Anvil nearby to temporarily buff your equipped weapon and armor.

### Antumbra's Sword Fight Strategy

 
Speed and precision. These would be the two words that you can think of when analyzing the combat style of this boss. At first, it will be quite difficult to catch him, and you may experience that frustration that just when you are about to hit him, Antumbra's Sword disappears in a dark smoke and then reappears at your back and slices you with his sword. Apart from his speed and precision, Antumbra's Sword has a very offensive behavior in combat. During the fight with him, we recommend that you have a defensive approach, and focus on strategic counterattacks that are timed after he launches an offensive move.

Antumbra's Order

### Antumbra's Order

 
 
 
 
 A dark religion that profanes light and life.
Its followers believe in wicked faith that worships darkness through human sacrifice. With sanctuaries scattered across Pywel, their influence runs deep. They believe Pywel is rife with discrimination and imbalance, and that only darkness can bring true equality and freedom.

Double-Sided Invitation is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. The Greymanes are invited to attend the Harvest Festival by Marquis Serkis. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

 
 

 
 
 Marquis Serkis announce the arrival of a Demenissian delegation and extended a banquet invitation to the Greymanes. This news poses a grave threat to Damiane, who is a Demenissian in hiding. However, she is currently nowhere to be found within the camp.

[...] of enemies in this location, players will be able to fill up the meter left of the minimap to obtain an Abyss Artifact.

### Head to Perwin Gate

 
Once you have cleared Perwin Prison Camp from Bleed Bandits, head to the Perwin Gate. You will again encounter a large number of Bleed Bandits in Perwin Gate, which you need to liberate as well. There are different types of enemies in this location, and it is highly recommended that you lure away first the melee ones and start targeting the ranged enemies. Once you have cleared all of the ranged enemies, you can focus on the melee ones. Try to also group them so you can hit them all at once.

content_head:
The Unreachable Village

[...] - Speak with the shai
 
 - Talk to Arkin
 
 - Retrieve the Relic of Pororin
 
 - Return the relic to Arkin

### Speak with the shai

 
When you are in Pororin Forest, southeast of the City of Hernand, you will find a village of children dressed in green robes and green hats. If you attempt to enter the village, a cutscene will play of you being tranquilized and dragged out to a tent outside the village.

 
 

 
At the third attempt of entering the village and waking up beside the tent, you will meet Arkin leaning on a tree ahead. Talk to Arkin to learn that he needs help retrieving a precious item of their chief. He will promise a way into the village when you help him. After hearing the request of Arkin, he will vanish, and you'll receive your next quest obj

[...] - A combination that doesn't match any of the hands above, where the last digit of the sum of the two numbers is 0.

### Unique Combinations

 
 
 - Warden 
 
 - A set formed with 4 and 9. Triggers a rematch if all other participants hold One-two or lower. The current pot remains for the next round.
 
 
 
 - High Warden 
 
 - Triggers a rematch if all other participants hold a 9 Pair or lower. The current pot remains for the next round.
 
 
 
 - Judge 
 
 
 - A set formed with 3 and 7. Achieves a special win if the strongest opponent hand is 9 Pair or lower. Otherwise, treated as Zero if there's no Pair present.
 
 
 
 - Executor 
 
 - A set formed with Red 4 and Red 7. This set can achieve a special win if the strongest set among the other participants is a Superior Pair. It ca

Wrestling Match

### Wrestling Match

 
 
 
 
 Region 
Hernand 
Location 
Kharonso 
Rewards 
Copper (Money)
Silver (Money) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Wrestling Match is a Minigame in Crimson Desert. Wrestling is a test of pure strength where victory is decided solely by grappling skills, without the use of strikes. Evade your opponent's attacks with agility while looking for an opening, then move in to execute a swift takedown. The moment your bodies lock is the turning point; once you have a hold of your opponent, press your advantage to secure the win. Minigames are casual side activities that players can participate in to interact with NPCs, gain knowledge of the world and culture, and earn unique rewards for winning.

### Weapon Slots & Equipment System in Crimson Desert

 
 The game features a multi-slot equipment system divided into two main sections:

 
 Primary Weapon Slots (Top Section):

 
 
 - One slot is dedicated to Two-Handed Weapons (e.g., Greatswords).
 
 - Two additional slots are reserved for One-Handed Weapons (e.g., Swords, Maces, Shields).
 
 - Players can dual wield one-handed weapons or mix offensive and defensive options.
 
 - All equipped Weapons can be swapped in real time during combat.
 
 
 

 
 Utility & Ranged Slots (Bottom Section):

 
 
 - One slot is assigned to Daggers, which functions as a stealth tool rather than a standard weapon.
 
 - One slot is for Ranged Weapons (Bows, Firearms, Hand Cannons, etc.).
 
 - One slot is used for Ammunition Types, enabling differ

### 
Meshley Trapsmith

Head over to Meshley Trapsmith over at The Witchwoods, southwest of the City of Hernand. If you've already activated it outside of this walkthrough, there is an Abyss Nexus by the Witchwoods that you can teleport over to get there faster, and from there, just head southeast. Upon reaching the house, you'll have to defeat a bunch of bandits who are planning to loot the place. After defeating the bandits, head over to the house on the right, minding the traps set around. Upon entering the house, you'll find a girl named Tanya who is really Elowen in disguise. She'll thank you for saving her f

Tranan's Request is a Faction Quest in Crimson Desert. Tranan will ask you to acquire a sword made by the renowned blacksmith of Hernand Castle to learn how to remake it. Faction Quests are optional quests that players can complete to increase their relationship with a specific Faction and gain XP and various rewards.

Crimson Warden is a Boss in Crimson Desert. The greatest archer of the Greymanes has defected. Now known as the Crimson Warden, she hunts humans like prey. Bosses are stronger enemies that players can encounter in the game through exploration or through story progression, defeating a boss will reward players with unique drops.

### Damiane Skills | Crimson Desert Wiki

This page was last edited on 8 April 2026, at 09:37.From Crimson Desert Wiki

Damiane Skills in Crimson Desert are unique, special abilities that can be unlocked for the playable character Damiane. Damiane's Skill Tree is divided into three branches. Skills in the color blue are associated with Stamina, Red with Health, while Skills in the color green are associated with Spirit. Additionally, some Skills for Damiane will include an inner skill that players can learn. These inner skills will allow you to modify and enhance your playthrough.

### 
Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

- During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. You'll then have to complete the puzzle using Force Palm to activate the Abyss Cresset and acquire the Abyss Artifact. For

Reed Devil

[...] swift counterattack. Getting the proper timing for the counterattack on this offensive move may require a few attempts.

### 
Swift Stab

This is the Reed Devil's special attack, and you can learn it if you are able to observe the move three times. After he charges at you and does a successful attack, he does a follow-up strike with a swift stab. Though this special attack cannot be blocked, there is a way to counter this offensive move. You can bait the Reed Devil to do the Swift Stab, and once he comes close, you can use the Blinding Flash skill against him. This will interrupt the attack, and he will be blinded. If the Blinding Flash skill doesn't work, you can evade it by doing a dodge roll to avoid getting hit. You can do a counterattack by hitting him as he recovers

Myurdin

[...] a counterattack after he is done with this offensive move, giving you enough chance to inflict damage to Myurdin.

### Command Barbarians

 
Myurdin commands his barbarians to eliminate you. You will notice three types of barbarians that will fight you, which will be the Melee Barbarian, Superior Barbarian, and Ranged Barbarian. It is recommended to eliminate the Ranged Barbarian first as they would interrupt you in combat a lot while you are fighting the Melee Barbarians. After eliminating the Ranged Barbarians, focus on attacking the Superior Barbarian. They act as Myurdin's tough line of defense, and taking them down would help you get closer to Myurdin and inflict damage to him. Be careful, as they have a tough health pool and they inflict heavier damage than the common

### 
Matthias

 Location
City of Hernand
Drops
Pump Kick (Skill)

Matthias is a Boss in Crimson Desert. A mighty warrior who has been seeking to test his combat skills with a Greymane, Matthias steps in and dares to duel you in the town square of Hernand. Bosses are stronger enemies that players can encounter in the game through exploration or through story progression, defeating a boss will reward players with unique drops.

Housing Guide

[...] Return to Luke to progress the quest, and this will fully unlock the abandoned house at the cliff top as your new home.

### 
Home Mechanics in Crimson Desert

Players can freely decorate their home after unlocking the Greymane Camp in Howling Hill. This takes place after progressing through the First Step to Rebuilding and completing Luke's Request. The second quest will tell you about the location of the abandoned house on the hilltop, and completing this will unlock the Home Decoration feature. This is the 6th quest from the Grounds of the Sunrise mission list from the Greymanes faction. This quest can only be completed when playing as Kliff.

Any items with the icon can be used to decorate your home. These items can be purchased at a furniture shop, or they can als

Lifeforms

maneuver and uses its claws to defend or catch prey. Highly cautious, it quickly hides in rock crevices or under the dirt when it senses a threat. Due to its small size, there are not many edible parts. 
Squid 
Aquatic Animals 
A creature that swims the sea with long tentacles. It is a unique-looking creature with large eyes and long tentacles. Its tentacles are stronger than expected, making it difficult to fish. Many seek it out as an ingredient for its unique texture. 
Freshwater Clam 
Aquatic Animals 
A creature that hides its body within a hard shell. It buries itself halfway in underwater sand or mud, filtering microscopic food to eat. Sensitive to changes in the environment, it prefers clean water. Its tough texture makes it a polarizing ingredient.

### 
Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

- During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. Steel Blaster

Hand Cannon

Attack 10

Critical Rate Lv.1

 A standard-issue blaster made with steel. It was developed after the need for a highly mobile heavy firearm became clear in war, but it's said to be too heavy and unwieldy for just anyone to use.
Steel Blaster is a Hand Cannon in Crimson Desert. Steel Blaster is a standard-issue blaster made with steel. Hand Cannons are ranged weapons that can deal damage to Enemies from a safe distance, and are used exclusively by Oongka.

### Horse Items | Crimson Desert Wiki

This page was last edited on 31 March 2026, at 01:43.From Crimson Desert Wiki

Horse Items in Crimson Desert are items needed to care for your horse mounts. These items will include consumables for your horse and gear for your horse that will grant a small buff when you mount your horse. Horse Items can usually be purchased from various Saddlery Vendors that are usually found by stables, they may also be crafted from various materials.

A black-market merchant of Three Saints' Falls. To conceal his work in the shadows, he diligently keeps up legitimate trade as well. It has earned him solid profit, but lately he has been tense after discovering counterfeits mixed into his stock.

### 
Crimson Desert - Boss Fights

Over on Crimson Desert's X account, the developers show off a couple of gameplay videos of bosses and how intense the battles can get when fighting against them. One of the bosses, called the White Horn, which resembles a giant white-furred ape with antlers and a long, silky tail, is said to have taken some children from a nearby settlement, and the player is tasked with bringing those kids back. Its quick and aggressive attacks leave no room for error. It can hide itself in the blizzard before charging at the player. It's shown in the video that players are able to climb and grab hold on to these lumbering enemies

Recovery Items in Crimson Desert are a vital category of items that provide immediate benefits to Kliff. These items have various purposes, such as increasing Kliff's health, temporarily boosting stats, or temporarily enhancing combat effectiveness. While Recovery Items are only a single use item, they can be quite common to come across such as purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or by crafting them.

### 
Church of Solumen

 A religion of Pywel that worships Solumen, the god of light. It holds the strongest influence in southern Pywel. Although its teachings recount the many miracles performed by Solumen, praying for miracles is considered taboo. They believe that living in accordance with the divine order established by Solumen is the true path of life.

Crimson Desert Crimson Nightmare Note, Tips & Trivia

- Optional Boss: No

- It is recommended to use the Anvil and Grind Stone before going to the battle area to temporarily buff your equipped armor and weapon.

- There are a lot of enemies in this area that can distract you while fighting Crimson Nightmare. We recommend that you clear the area around Crimson Nightmare first to eliminate any distractions.

- You will need to bring Crimson Nightmare down on the ground to temporarily disable it and inflict damage. Use Axiom Force, then Right Analog Stick Down to pull it down, This will cause the boss to be temporarily stunned and you can attack

### 
Track the invader and enter the abyss

A big circle will appear on your minimap, but all you have to do is make your way up to the second level of the castle and enter the Alchemist's Chamber. You'll know you're at the right place cause the door to the Alchemist's chamber will have embers on its doorstep when you point your lantern at it. Upon entering the room, you'll find an Icy White Processed Crystal on the table, but this will require you to steal it if you wish to grab it; doing so will cost you Contribution XP. ### 
Dreadnought Fight Strategy

Approaching the inner courtyard of the Marni's Laboratorium, you will encounter the Dreadnought and battle him to acquire one of the fortress keys that is found on Marni's Laboratorium. This military mechanical functions quite similar as an A.T.A.G, but with a few deadly modifications. We noticed that this mechanical monster has a tough armor, which makes it endure more attacks. Its offensive moves also deal heavy damage, and they cannot be blocked. This boss also has a very aggressive approach in battle. We recommend that you engage to it with a defensive approach, and prioritize doing counterattacks and back stab strikes

Golden Star

[...] try to shoot Golden Star with your attacks that use electricity, so you can prevent him from performing this attack.

### 
Fiery Tornado Attack

The Fiery Tornado Attack is also one of Golden Star's deadliest attacks. You will notice that Golden Start's eyes begin to burn, an indication that he is going to summon multiple fiery tornadoes on the battlefield. These Fiery Tornadoes will lift you into the air and will also inflict fire damage if you are caught. To avoid being caught by this attack, move away from the Fiery Tornadoes as fast as you can, and try to shoot Golden Star with your electrical abilities. Once you have inflicted him with enough electricity, Golden Star will fall to the ground, which you can use to your advantage and put maximum damage to his health by

### Annihilate the Black Bears

 
After saving your friends, Myurdin shows himself and challenges Kliff to a fight, mocking him as he does. You'll notice that learning info will prompt a notification in the top-left corner of your screen to show up as "Learning in Progress..." and will add to your knowledge, like when you first come face-to-face with Myurdin, as initially his name in the subtitles will just be shown as ???. Fight off the Black Bears as best you can; as many as they are, it would be in your best interest to take out the archers so that it'll be easier for you to funnel in the melee fighters, as well as Myurdin himself.

Embers of Return

[...] wants you to find them before they get moving. After speaking with Marius, you will receive your next quest objective.

### Check the Rumor

 
The Greymane survivors are in the Hills of No Return, north of the Abyss Nexus, which is near the Goldleaf Trading Post. You will find Yann, Silvan, Fritz, Aldric, and Otto settled in a house near Vilkom Outpost. 

 
 

 
Talk to them, and they will welcome you with joy and ask you where you have been all this time. The conversation will end with them getting excited to reunite with the other Greymanes. You will complete this quest objective and receive the next after the blissful moment with the survivors. However, you need to complete The Greymanes' New Fangs Faction Quest first before proceeding to the next quest objective

Goldenfist Arena

### Goldenfist Arena

 
 
 
 
 An arena operated by the Goldleaf Merchant Guild. High-stakes matches take place here every day. Renowned as a gathering place for true warriors, winning here is considered a mark of great prestige. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Goldenfist Arena is a Location in Crimson Desert. An arena operated by the Goldleaf Merchant Guild. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Disturbance at the Arena

[...] He got drunk and interrupted the finals of the fighting pits, and the people in charge are asking for compensation.

### Win three times at the arena

 
Upon arriving at the Goldenfist Arena, approach the Goldleaf Private Soldiers, and a cutscene will start. The guard mentions that Yann cost them large sums of coin. The guards suggest that you get into the arena and get the crowd into a betting frenzy to make up for the lost coin. You'll only need to beat 3 NPCs in a fist fight, strictly no swords or any kind of weapons or special moves allowed. Approach the host to start your first fight; you will need 30 copper to participate, though. You'll be fighting against Wandering Freeswords of varying skill, so be a bit cautious in your bouts. ### Speak with Naira

 
Head northwest towards Capra Pasture. Upon arriving, you'll find Naira ridiculing Duane about his archery skills. Approaching them will prompt a cutscene to play, where Naira tells what happened in the recent archery contest over at Lioncrest Manor. Apparently, Duane smacked himself with his own arrow. Duane, wanting to prove himself and to stop Naira from teasing him, asks you to come along as a "witness", get on your horse, and follow Duane to Lioncrest Manor. On your way there, he asks you to win the contest for him just to shut Naira up.

### Talk to Shakatu at the Goldleaf Merchant Guild

 
When you are in the area of Goldleaf Guildhouse, southeast of the City of Hernand, you will find Shakatu and his two guild members having a discussion. Approach them to talk to Shakatu, and he will ask you to follow him.

 
 

 
He will tell you that the bandits have been actively targeting their trading sites lately, and he believes there is a traitor within the merchant guild. He will ask you to handle the interrogation to draw eyes within the guild while Shakatu investigates the bandits.
