First Trial of Trust

[...] end when the servant ponders the whereabouts of the steward who is supposed to tell the count how hard he is working.

### Speak with House Roberts's caretaker

 
You will find the House Roberts's caretaker, named Erich, at the Muckroot Ranch, sitting in the field of flowers, where you will also see a masked man playing with his masked children. When you talk to him, he is a bit unwelcoming and wants to focus on the bandit incident. He will tell you that the bandits keep sneaking onto the count's land, but the guards can't catch them, so he will ask you if you're up for the task. He will inform you that you can start with some of the bandits who are camped in the cask house, and the conversation will end, leading to your next quest objective.

Missing Companion

Watch your spacing when they rush towards you, and always try to keep them in front of you. There is one bandit in particular who'll be able to perform the Dropkick. What you can do is to kill him last and bait him into doing the skill so that you can observe and learn it safely. It'll be better this way, as you'll need to observe him do it three times. After defeating the bandits, you'll be able to safely look around for some loot. There will be 2 chests by some crates and barrels next to the sheep pen, although taking the items from these chests will result in Kliff committing a crime. There will also be a Palmer Pill by the bonfire, which will be safe to take. You'll find Wooly in the sheep pen. Carry Wooly back to Willian to conclude the quest.

### Speak with Erich

 
After liberating the Karin Quarry from Bleed Bandits, you will encounter Erich inside the quarry. Speak to him to learn about the situation on the crane. He will tell you that the crane operator is gone, which puts a delay on moving the massive rock. Trial After Trial

Lure them out to the road, as fighting in the camp itself may prove much more difficult due to the foliage, as well as their equipment all around.

 
 

 
After clearing out the bandits, enter the camp. You'll first have to equip your lantern to scan the area for the memory fragment. Your lantern will pulse and signal when you are close to a memory fragment. The memory fragments will look like a bunch of floating blue dots. Scan it to learn about The Missing Cow memory fragment. You'll see in the memory fragment a Goldleaf Merchant and a Bandit talking about how the cows went mad and randomly died. There will be a Palmar Pill for you to take on top of one of the crates, and you'll actually be able to skin the deceased cows for their materials and ingredients.

Demenissian Delegation

Hernand Castle and speak with Marquis Serkis and Barden Middler, who'll be speaking with the Delegation Ambassador in front of the banquet hall.

 
 

 
Barden Middler mentions a Duke Caliburn, mentioning that he's the one behind the event they call the Blood Coronation, which resulted in the deaths of countless nobles in Demeniss. The Demeniss Delegation enters the banquet hall, followed by their Grand General's special gift. They open up the chained box, revealing Kearush the Slayer bound upside down. A gift to Hernand on behalf of the King of Demeniss, says the delegation ambassador. He then orders 4 musketeers to fire on the bound beast. They take multiple shots right before the beast gets freed by accident. It massacres nobles inside the banquet hall.

Kliff Skills

[...] an inner skill that players can learn. These inner skills will allow you to modify and enhance your playthrough.

### How do Skills Work in Crimson Desert?

 
 Skills in Crimson Desert are equippable abilities that can be used to modify or improve playstyle. Skills can be acquired through multiple means, and once learned, they can be used by pressing a combination of buttons. Additionally, there are skills that, once acquired, can be enhanced multiple times. This upgrades the level of the skill and allows you to learn sub-branches of that particular move. Players should also take note that active skills will have a corresponding cost, either in Spirit or Stamina.

On the Right Path is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. Kliff meets up with Grundir and Octavius to help out in the experiments. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

 The largest farm in Hernand. It serves as the primary supplier of food and ingredients for the entire estate and House Grace.

Kilnden Workshop (Main Quest) is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. After a night of feasting, Kliff wakes up to an explosion near the camp. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

 
 

 
 
 A sudden explosion has shattered the peace of the morning. The blast occurred close to the camp and could pose a serious threat. Let's head to the scene and see what happened.

Scholastone (Main Quest)

[...] - Head to Scholastone
 
 - Find out Scholastone Institute's location
 
 - Find the path to Scholastone Institute

### Visit the fence

 
Head over to Bluemont Manor, head inside the door on the right side of the building, and make your way upstairs. You'll find Darroch dealing with his customers. Upon approaching him, a cutscene plays out where Kliff tells him that he isn't there to buy but to pick something up. Darroch initially doesn't believe him, but Kliff tells him that he's there for the alchemist's belongings. Darroch is shocked and hastens to assist Kliff. He yells at his employees to leave just before giving Kliff the disguise he needs to enter the Scholastone Institute undetected.

Scholastone Institute

### Scholastone Institute

 
 
 
 
 The premier institute on the continent of Pywel. Its ranks consist mostly of troll scholars, many of whom are dedicated to researching the Abyss. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Scholastone Institute is a Location in Crimson Desert. Scholastone Institute is founded by the brilliant minds of the troll scholars, who are dedicated to acquiring knowledge and understanding of all the things in the world. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Witch's House

### Witch's House

 
 
 
 
 A house within the Alfonso Estate of Hernand, featuring a garden adorned with flowers and a fountain. It is said that the legendary Witch of Hernand resides here. Though she has never been seen, food and a teapot are always set upon the table

Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Kiln Repair at the Kilnden Workshop

[...] Workshop Quest Notes, Tips & Trivia

 
 
 - Notes, Tips & Trivia for Kiln Repair at the Kilnden Workshop goes here.

### Activate the ancient generator

 
Approach the ancient generator. Your goal is to reactivate it, and to do that, you'll have to align 4 of the symbols seen on the rings of the kiln. There will be wooden levers sticking out of the kiln and a dial in the middle. Using the dial by interacting with it changes the disc that you control with the wooden levers, lighting up the symbol, and showing you which one is currently selected. As the top and bottom symbols are already in the correct position, select the 2 in the middle and align them with the top and bottom symbols. Doing so correctly will have the symbols glow from yellow to blu

Mysterious Man is a Main Quest in Crimson Desert. After trying your hand at some arm wrestling in the Hernand Inn, you spot some children taunting an old beggar outside the tavern. Main Quests in Crimson Desert are quests that are required to complete in order to progress the main story of the game, this rewards the player with unique loot and additional areas to explore.

 
 

 
 
 There is a commotion near the sewer by the tavern. Children are taunting an old beggar lying on the ground.

 Region 
The Abyss

Hernand Sewers 
Other Locations

White Crow is an NPC in Crimson Desert. White Crow is one of the four beings responsible for maintaining the balance of the Abyss. She is a transcendent entity that has existed since ancient times alongside Alustin. NPCs in Pywel provide various services or can give Quests to add to the game's story. These NPCs can be found in various places and are associated with various factions or houses.

Hernand Sewers

### Hernand Sewers

 
 
 
 
 An altar found by following the path down into the Hernand sewers. While it appears to be a sacred site for enshrining something of great importance, the blood spattered across the floor suggests a more sinister reality. Should curiosity drive one to investigate, they may find themselves entangled in grave trouble. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Hernand Sewers is a Location in Crimson Desert. While it appears to be a sacred site for enshrining something of great importance, the blood spattered across the floor suggests a more sinister reality. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Bismuth Cannon

### Bismuth Cannon

 
 
 
 Hand Cannon 
 
 
 
 
 Attack 
 16 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A cannon clad in bismuth. An ominous energy lingers within it. Bismuth itself is dangerous when handled recklessly, but the greater threat is likely the malice of the Antumbra zealots who forged it, which has seeped into the weapon. 
Bismuth Cannon is a Hand Cannon in Crimson Desert. Bismuth Cannon is a cannon clad in bismuth. Hand Cannons are ranged weapons that can deal damage to Enemies from a safe distance, and are used exclusively by Oongka.

 
 

 
 
 A cannon clad in bismuth. An ominous energy lingers within it. Bismuth itself is dangerous when handled recklessly, but the greater threat is likely the malice of the Antumbra zealots who forged it, which has seeped into the weapon.

### Beehive Club

 
 
 
 One-Handed Weapon 
 
 
 
 
 Attack 
 18 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A club with a beehive impaled on a stick. Bees sleep inside the hive, and when an enemy is struck, they awaken and swarm out. 
Beehive Club is a One-Handed Weapon in Crimson Desert. Beehive Club is a unique weapon that can be found by shooting a beehive in the Hernandian forest. One-Handed Weapons are light and quick to wield and deal light damage to nearby Enemies.

 
 

 
 
 A club with a beehive impaled on a stick. Bees sleep inside the hive, and when an enemy is struck, they awaken and swarm out.

Mace of Resolve

### Mace of Resolve

 
 
 
 One-Handed Weapon 
 
 
 
 
 Attack 
 13 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A mace once held by the Marquis of Calphade on the border front. Its blackened head and red cloth embody the resolve of House Lanford, known as the Unyielding Shields. Every swing lands with a heavy ring, like a vow to never fall back. 
Mace of Resolve is a One-Handed Weapon in Crimson Desert. Mace of Resolve is a mace once held by the Marquis of Calphade on the border front. One-Handed Weapons are light and quick to wield and deal light damage to nearby Enemies.

The First Steps of Little Marksmen is a Faction Quest in Crimson Desert. The First Steps of Little Marksmen is where you need to craft bows for the children in Howling Hill as they need to learn how to use weapons even at an early age. Faction Quests are optional quests that players can complete to

Embers of Return

[...] Faction, and complete this quest objective. You will receive another quest objective after completing this quest.

### 
Return to Count Roberts

After completing Sealed in Stone Faction Quest, this next quest requires you to report back to Count Roberts. You can fast travel using the Abyss Nexus near the City of Hernand. Go to the Bluemont Manor to speak to Count Roberts. He will greet you as the hero of the house and thank you by giving x3 Azurite, x3 Bloodstone, and an Engraved Gold Earring. He will also tell you that the king will hear about your deeds for his house.  A plate cloak named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to barren lands with words, not the sword. It embodies the glory of Hernand, which was established by humble heroes. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Canta Plate Cloak is a Cloak in Crimson Desert. Cloaks is an Armor type that is equipped on the shoulders of the player, although it does not grant any defense, it aids players with added effects such as Elemental Resistance, Critical Hit Chances, and more. These types of Armor can be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or defeating Enemies and Bosses.

Bekker Dagger is a Dagger in Crimson Desert. Bekker Dagger is a worn yet reliable blade once favored by the frugal warrior Bekker. Daggers are slightly large knives that players can use to perform sneak attacks or final attacks in quick succession to nearby Enemies.

### Where to Find Hernandian Attire in Crimson Desert

 
Hernandian Attire can be found in the following locations:

 
 
 - Earned by completing the Actions Speak Louder than Words main quest. The pair can be encountered at Muckroot Ranch, located on the edge of Hernand. To assist them, take the broom leaning by the entrance and ascend to the rooftop to clear debris from their chimney. Once the task is completed, the couple expresses their gratitude, and the Hernandian Attire is granted immediately alongside the remaining quest rewards.

Abyss Core

### How to Use Crimson Desert Abyss Cores

 
 Abyss Cores are an important part of equipment customization in Crimson Desert, as they let players tailor their gear to different combat needs and playstyles. A well-placed core can significantly improve the usefulness of a weapon or armor piece, making them valuable for both early progression and more specialized builds later on. Because inventory space is limited, players may find themselves collecting Abyss Cores before they can actually use them, making it worthwhile to unlock access to the proper vendor as soon as possible.

Braised Ribs (Recipe)
Field Pot Cooking

 [Recipe]
Required Tool: Cooking Tool
Ingredients: Meat x4 + Vegetable x2 + Fruit x2 + Water x3
※ Meat: tough meat, lean meat, tender meat, etc.
※ Vegetables: onion, garlic, carrot, etc.
※ Fruit: raspberry, blackberry, pomegranate, etc.
Simmer thick ribs with vegetables until tender for a signature nourishing meal.
The sweet, infused broth makes it a perfect dish to eat with rice.

### All Bell Locations | Crimson Desert Wiki

This page was last edited on 26 March 2026, at 01:10.From Crimson Desert Wiki

Bells in Crimson Desert are interacted with to reveal areas and points of interest within locations. There is a total of 8 bells that can be rang to reveal the areas where the sound of the bell can be heard. Shortly after, a Shai Resident hiding within the bell will reveal itself to the player, and the related quest will be completed. Each of the quest is related to the Toll of Pywel mission, which is a Pororin Forest Guardian Faction Quest. Ringing the bell does not completely reveal the surrounding area, but it will only rev

### 
Crafting and Upgrading in Crimson Desert

The aspect of crafting in Crimson Desert goes beyond crafting Consumables and Equipment, as you can experience cooking up big meals that replenish your health, your spirit, and your stamina, and also brew up medicine and potions to give you temporary buffs and to heal your ailments. There are various means of obtaining Resources for crafting these different items. For crafting Weapons, you can look for any Blacksmith in town or at the Greymane Camp, provided you have the required materials to do so. Flurry of Blows is a Skill in Crimson Desert. It is a skill that can be unlocked and equipped onto Kliff. Skills are active and passive abilities that players can use to modify or enhance a character's combat style and unlock methods of exploration. There are multiple ways to unlock and upgrade skills; some skills may be learned through exploration or from enemies in combat. Skills can also be upgraded using Abyss Artifacts found throughout Crimson Desert.

Strongbox with Wheels

[...] for him at Anvil Riverside through the letter. You will receive your next quest objective after reading the letter.

### Running Loot

 
Anvil Riverside is in the northeast of Greymanes Camp. Wait for Yann riding the wagon, then hop on the wagon once Yann calls you. Accompany Yann until you reach the Timberturner Wainwright to meet with Naira.

 
 

 
Naira will check the wagon as soon as you arrive in the camp. She will tell Yann that the wagon is full of rubbish and there is not a single coin in it. From there, Yann will check the wagon and realize that he got the wrong one, so he will ask you to sell it while he investigates what went wrong. You will receive the next quest objective after the conversation with Yann.

Chance to Make a Fortune

[...] - You will acquire this quest after completing the Brightening the Spirits faction quest. [Crimson Desert Map]

### Listen to Yann's concern

 
You will see Yann in despair at the Greymanes Camp in Howling Hill when you finish the faction quest, Brightening the Spirits. Talk to him to learn that he got scammed after winning at the gambling in Hernand Tavern. He will ask you to accompany him to investigate how he got scammed.

 

 
While you are following Yann, he will tell you the story of how he got scammed. You will follow him until he asks you to go to the tavern to investigate because he got banned after the incident he caused to get his money back. You will receive your next quest objective after parting ways with Yann.

Brightening the Spirits

[...] the cauldron she left the lid off. You will receive your next quest objective after the conversation with Naria.

### Vibrant Dye

 
Your next quest objective is to create a dye in the City of Hernand. Use the cauldron inside the house to the southeast of Hernand Blacksmith. Choose the Bright Red Dye to craft under the dye section of the cauldron. You will need 10 Pink Rosemary, 3 Rhinoceros Beetles, and 3 Longhorn Beetles to craft the dye.

 
 

 
Use the dye after crafting it, then go to a Dyehouse to dye an outfit. It is in Hernand Farmhouse, southeast of the City of Hernand. Talk to Theoric, then choose the "Dye" option to select an armor piece to dye. You will receive your next quest objective after dyeing an armor piece.

Unwelcomed Guests

[...] already activated the Abyss Nexus to the north of the city, click on the map to fast travel to the City of Hernand.

### Check the commotion in front of the castle gate

 
A cutscene will then play out where some guards are trying to calm a horse that got loose between the carts. Your next goal will be to catch the loose horse and tame it. Catch up to the horse and mount it. Use your left stick to control the horse. For this to be easier, point the camera straight down to see where the horse is facing, and point yourself in the opposite direction. A dial will show up at the bottom of your screen showing how much progress you've made to break the horse and tame it. Fill it up to successfully tame the horse. Once you've tamed the horse, bring it back to its stable.

Southern Quarry is a Location in Crimson Desert. A quarry renowned for its high-quality stone. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Spearhead Posthouse

### Spearhead Posthouse

 
 
 
 
 A rest stop frequented by wagons and cavalries traveling along the riverside trade route. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Spearhead Posthouse is a Location in Crimson Desert. A rest stop frequented by wagons and cavalries traveling along the riverside trade route. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Stormtalon Cave of Time

### Stormtalon Cave of Time

 
 
 
 
 A hidden cave tucked away within Stormtalon Ridge. It is known as the 'Cave of Time' due to the strange sensation that time flows differently within its depths. Beyond this distorted atmosphere, at the very heart of the cavern, rare ores can be found embedded in the darkness 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Stormtalon Cave of Time is a Location in Crimson Desert. A hidden cave tucked away within Stormtalon Ridge. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Stormtalon Ridge

### Stormtalon Ridge

 
 
 
 
 This mountain is the reason Calphiade is known as a natural fortress. Along with the Argent Peaks, it restricts potential routes for those who seek to intrude from the outside. It earned its name from the mountain ridges, which appear jagged and torn as if mauled by massive claws 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Stormtalon Ridge is a Location in Crimson Desert. This mountain is the reason Calphiade is known as a natural fortress. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Stormtalon Ridge Mine

### Stormtalon Ridge Mine

 
 
 
 
 A long mine that runs across the Stormtalon Ridge. Records indicate it also serves as a passage through the mountain. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Stormtalon Ridge Mine is a Location in Crimson Desert. A long mine that runs across the Stormtalon Ridge. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

The Argent Peaks

### The Argent Peaks

 
 
 
 
 A massive mountain range that stretches across the western edge of Hernand. Its cliffs are sheer and the terrain so treacherous that not a single soul is said to have reached the summit. While it is known to shield Pywel from the biting winds, what lies on the other side remains a total mystery 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The Argent Peaks is a Location in Crimson Desert. A massive mountain range that stretches across the western edge of Hernand. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

The Sage's Peak

### The Sage's Peak

 
 
 
 
 A mountain range located at the northernmost tip of Hernand, where it meets Pailune's Silver Wolf Mountain. According to legend, an ancient sage of Hernand advised his descendants never to cross those peaks, warning that the lands beyond were nothing but cold and barren wastes. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The Sage's Peak is a Location in Crimson Desert. A mountain range located at the northernmost tip of Hernand, where it meets Pailune's Silver Wolf Mountain. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

The Witchwoods

### The Witchwoods

 
 
 
 
 A forest known as the home of a witch. Deep within its seldom-trodden paths stands a solitary, empty house. Though the townsfolk claim never to have seen the witch herself, the ever-blooming flowers and the fresh fruit laid upon the table make it easy to believe the rumors of her presence 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The Witchwoods is a Location in Crimson Desert. A forest known as the home of a witch. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Thinker's Meadow

### Thinker's Meadow

 
 
 
 
 A wide meadow with fresh green grass spread out. Formerly a rest stop for the Goldleaf Merchant Guild, it transformed into its current state after being abandoned. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Thinker's Meadow is a Location in Crimson Desert. A wide meadow with fresh green grass spread out. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Three Saints' Falls

### Three Saints' Falls

 
 
 
 
 A massive waterfall located near Hernand Castle. Also known as Solumen Falls, it is a mandatory stop for pilgrims visiting Hernand. Legend has it that three saints, answering Solumen’s call, caused water to flow from the mountain to create this waterfall. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Three Saints' Falls is a Location in Crimson Desert. This is where Cliff is next seen alive and is being called out by Sebastian. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Torchlight Beacon

### Torchlight Beacon

 
 
 
 
 A beacon built to swiftly signal emergencies. Situated in a location visible directly from the City of Hernand, it provides quick updates on the events within Calphade. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Torchlight Beacon is a Location in Crimson Desert. A beacon built to swiftly signal emergencies. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Upper Nas River

### Upper Nas River

 
 
 
 
 The source of the Nas River. The river originates in high mountains covered in snow year-round. Sand and small pebbles naturally purify the water flowing from underground springs; the further upstream one travels, the clearer the water and the more abundant the fish. The river is well known for never freezing, even in the depths of winter 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Upper Nas River is a Location in Crimson Desert. The source of the Nas River. The river originates in high mountains covered in snow year-round. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Vilkom Outpost

### Vilkom Outpost

 
 
 
 
 An outpost located in the northern border of Hernand, serving as both a defensive post and a military training ground. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Vilkom Outpost is a Location in Crimson Desert. An outpost located in the northern border of Hernand. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Warspike Spearmaker

### Warspike Spearmaker

 
 
 
 
 A workshop dedicated to crafting spears. It was built under the supervision of House Alfonau, known as the House of Spears. Staking their family name, they strive to provide high-quality polearms to the Hernandian Guard 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Warspike Spearmaker is a Location in Crimson Desert. A workshop dedicated to crafting spears. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Whispering Grotto

### Whispering Grotto

 
 
 
 
 A hidden cave tucked behind the waterfall across from Senia. The sound of the wind whistling through narrow crevices mingles with the steady rush of the water, creating a strange sense of serenity. This tranquil atmosphere, reminiscent of a soft whisper, makes one wish to linger here forever rather than leave 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Whispering Grotto is a Location in Crimson Desert. A hidden cave tucked behind the waterfall across from Senia. Locations are explorable areas that are spread across different regions in Pywel. Players can discover various NPCs, obtain unique Items, and encounter ferocious Enemies and Bosses.

Street Vendor

 Location

Street Vendors are a special type of Vendors in Crimson Desert. Street Vendors are NPCs who run stalls and can be found in different regions all across Pywel. ### 
Abyss Cresset of Meandering Hills

- During the Main Quest: Reunion, speak with Rulupee sitting up on a wall above the archway of the Lioncrest Watchtower. She will tell you to follow her cat, which will lead you to a ruin in Meandering Hills. Inside the ruin, you'll see a hologram where you can learn the skill Nature's Grasp through observation. Beside the hologram is an inactive Abyss Cresset. Head further inside the ruin using Nature's Grasp to find another hologram inside. Observe the hologram to learn Focus. Subcontent:Walkthrough 1 Prologue

[...] Sebastian is an artisan at the Wycliffe Mappery who helped Kliff regain his strength after the Black Bears' ambush.

### 
Expanding your Inventory

Kliff says his farewells, telling Sebastian that he'll be heading off, and Sebastian lets him know that if he decides to head into town, he should check Hernand Inn, informing him that news travels fast and that there might be some information for him there. A couple of Bleed Bandits arrive and beat Sebastian, extorting him for money. Defeat the Bleed Bandits, time your blocks right to stagger the enemies, and perform even more attacks before they can retaliate. You'll receive x1 Medium Bag after you defeat the bandits. In the beginning, you'll start with 20 slots in your inventory, not including the inv

Subcontent:Walkthrough 2 Chapter 1: The First Encounter

[...] the Slope challenge, where you'll need to slide down 100m to complete. Doing so will unlock the Haste I Abyss Core.

### 
Anvil Riverside Terrace

After picking up the artifact, take the first left, and you'll find a path between the hills for you to go through. Once you're through, you'll spot some dark rocks on your right, past the blue glowing ones; those will be the Iron Ore that you need for Rhett. Approach the deposit and interact with it with your pickaxe to start mining. Mine until you get 3 Iron Ore. Just in front of the iron deposit you mined, there will be 5 Bleed Bandits who seem to have recently raided a caravan. You can use this opportunity to finish one of the two challenges you picked up, which are the Shield of

Subcontent:Walkthrough 3 Chapter 2: Golden Greed

[...] as you complete them, to unlock the aforementioned quest. We'll go through these one at a time as fast as possible.

### 
Bloomwood Ranch

Starting with Missing Companion, we'll be heading over to Bloomwood Ranch, where a crying child by the name of Willian is asking for help finding his lost sheep. After speaking with Willian, speak with the men and the children to find out more about what happened. The men will mention a bandit camp across the Nas River. Head south to Nas River Fishing Dock, crossing over to the Nas Riverside, where there will be a group of bandits camped. Take out the bandits, but one of them will be able to perform the Dropkick skill. Leaving him last will allow you to observe him doing so without getting interrup

Honey

How to Obtain / Where to Find:
### Where to Find Honey in Crimson Desert
 
Can be obtained after completing Faction Quests:

 
 
 - Acquired after completing the quest Where the Sweetness Stopped in Pollengarth Apiary. [Crimson Desert Map Link]

Can be obtained from bee box at an apiary. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Honey is a Gatherable Item in Crimson Desert. These items are essential materials used for crafting and refining equipment, cooking meals, and brewing potions. Gatherables can often be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or defeating Enemies and Bosses.

 
 

 
 
 Delivers a rich sweetness with a hint of floral aroma. Maintains its flavor even during long periods of storage. Can be obtained from bee box at an apiary.

obtained from bee box at an apiary.

Red Seaweed

###

Cloaks is an Armor type that is equipped on the shoulders of the player, although it does not grant any defense, it aids players with added effects such as Elemental Resistance, Critical Hit Chances, and more. These types of Armor can be obtained by purchasing from Vendors, completing Quests, or defeating Enemies and Bosses.

Antumbra's Order

 A dark religion that profanes light and life.
Its followers believe in wicked faith that worships darkness through human sacrifice. With sanctuaries scattered across Pywel, their influence runs deep. They believe Pywel is rife with discrimination and imbalance, and that only darkness can bring true equality and freedom.

Antumbra's Order is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Antumbra's Order is a religious order that worships darkness and practices human sacrificial rites. ### 
Ator Archon of Antumbra Fight Strategy

Ator is one of the Overwhelming Beings that will surely challenge you in this game. We have observed that it has a very balance approach in combat, which we find it difficult to find any counters against it. Some of its offensive moves can be overwhelming, just like the Netherworld Strike where it launches a barrage of conjured mystical orbs from the dark void, which can deal massive damage if hit. Throughout the battle, you may find it inevitable to use a lot of HP recovery items, so before the fight it is crucial to prepare by visiting the town first and bring supplies, and also use a nearby Anvil

Awakened Lucian Bastier

a dodge roll continuously away from Lucian, and then once he leaps in your direction, attempt to dash behind him and perform a backstab counter.

### 
Crimson Desert Shot Contest: Gun Minigame Guide & How to Play

- Refreshes in: There is no refresh time for this minigame. As long as you have enough currency to spend, you can always play this game. (Requires 1.00 Silver to Play)

- Special Condition Notes: This game is exclusive to the Damiane.

Enjoy a quick game of Shot Contest: Gun - How to Play and Win "Shot Contest: Gun":

- Test your shooting skills in a shot contest.

- You need to spend 1.00 Silver to participate in this minigame.

- Hold the button to withdraw your gun and aim, then release to fire.

- Be the first to hit 10 randomly appearing targets to win.

- Don't miss your mome

Hand Cannons in Crimson Desert are a type of Weapon that players can use to deal devastating damage to Enemies from a distance. Hand Cannons are high-impact ranged weapons that fire powerful projectiles, allowing players to eliminate targets with explosive force, even those positioned out of reach. Due to their weight and firing mechanism, they often require careful timing and handling, but compensate with exceptional stopping power. Gregor the Halberd of Carnage

[...] you can inflict massive damage by doing a finisher move. Repeat this until you defeat Gregor the Halberd of Carnage.

### Gregor the Halberd of Carnage Fight Strategy

 
Encountering Gregor in combat, you will be challenged by one of the most difficult bosses in this game. Though he only has one HP bar, we noticed that the attacks inflicted on Gregor deal quite a small amount of damage compared to other bosses. This can be due to the toughness given by his full armor. For a huge stature, his movements are beyond normal, and what makes it more difficult is that his halberd has a long reach for a melee weapon. Gregor also has a very offensive nature for his battle strategy, and he will use everything at his disposal. In this battle, we recommend that you

Fortain the Cursed Knight

A weakness that we have discovered with Fortain is that he takes a bit of time to recover with heavy attacks, and he has a slow turn rate. He can also be disabled for a few seconds with using a three hit combo with Force Palm to disable him, which can be followed up with a few attacks or a finisher move if his stagger meter is full to inflict more damage. Ideally, you would want to be as defensive as you could through using Evasive Roll against his offensive moves, and wait for the timing when you can get behind him to do a backstab hit, or do the three hit combo with Force Palm. By being careful, you will avoid losing too much HP and maximize the potential of your counterattacks.

Awakened Lucian Bastier

over time. His elemental damage affects you when you get hit by his attacks, or if you step into the burning ground caused by his offensive moves.
 
 - Before combat, it is recommended to do preparation and bring a lot of HP recovery items. If you also have stashed a Palmar Pill, it may come handy incase you get slain in combat.
 
 - It is recommended to upgrade your equipped gear to Tier IV at least before fighting this boss. We also recommend unlocking Shield Sentinel, and maxing out the Armed Combat skill of Damiane. It will help you throughout this boss fight.
 
 - In case you get defeated by this boss and do not use a Palmar Pill, you will need to restart the fight from fighting the first phase with Lucian Bastier.

Walter Lanford

It is recommended to play the fight against him with a defensive approach and maintain a safe distance when he is launching his ranged attacks. His primary and special attacks, such as the Double Barrel Shot and Double Barrel Barrage, have a medium distance of attack range, and they can be easily avoided if you get the timing to do a backslide as he launches this offensive move. Alternatively, you can block it with your shield, though due to his quick attack speed, you may be bombarded with his rapid firing, and any mistake could lead to you taking too much damage. You also have to be careful with his Scattershot and Shrapnel Shower, as these offensive moves have a chance of knocking down your character, which opens up a window for Walter to deal more damage while you are d

Master Du

[...] equipped armor and weapon. This helps maximize your gear's potential with temporary buff on its attack and defense.

### Master Du Fight Strategy

 
After you unlock the mysterious puzzle that unlocks the magical cavern, walk inside it and you will meet the powerful sage who will put your skills to the test. Master Du is an ally of the White Crow and Alustin, which will be revealed to you later when you follow him to the Abyss. Your objective is to demonstrate your combat skills and defeat Master Du in battle. He will have a balanced approached when it comes to battle, and you will notice that this boss will only strike if he has a clear window for landing an offensive move. This battle will challenge you to a whole new level. Our recommendation is to approach him with a d

Half Moon Reaper

[...] Boss in Crimson Desert

 
 
 - Location: Western Court, Demeniss
 
 - Encountered during the quest Half Moon Reaper.

### Half Moon Reaper Crimson Desert Boss Drops & Rewards

 
 
 - Abyss Artifact x1
 
 - Demenessian Contribution EXP +400
 
 - You will learn a skill from Half Moon Reaper called the Nature's Echo. You need to bait the boss twice to perform this offensive move by doing a dodge roll away from his location, so he will be forced to do this skill at a distance. Observe this twice without any interruption, and you will learn this skill.

 
 - You will learn a skill from Half Moon Reaper called the Echoing Forward Slash. You need to bait the boss twice to perform this offensive move by doing a dodge roll away from his location, so he will be forced to dash

New Moon Reaper

[...] be forced to do this skill at a distance. Observe this twice without any interruption, and you will learn this skill.

### Crimson Desert New Moon Reaper Note, Tips & Trivia

 
 
 - Optional Boss: No
 
 - During the battle, New Moon Reaper will have one HP bar that you need to eliminate. This is compensated by its balanced offensive and defensive behavior, making him difficult to predict.
 
 - It is recommended to stack up some HP recovery items while visiting a town through cooking and buying food items from merchant NPCs before going to New Moon Reaper's battle area in Southern Court.

Grave Walker

[...] the area of the secret marker to push the wall that hides it and then enter the chamber to obtain the hidden treasure.

### Grave Walker Fight Strategy

 
Encountering Grave Walker as you discover the depths of the Silent Falls Hideout in Hills of No Return, you will fight this massive boss who moves slowly. He is the only mystical creature that you will fight in this area, and it seems to guard some hidden treasures that you will find here. The Grave Walker has a slow speed and turn rate, and his attack speed is also slow, which makes it easy for you to perform multiple attacks to quickly eliminate it. It is recommended to have an offensive approach with killing this boss.

Hexe Marie

serious damage if not dealt with. We recommend taking out the Urn Swordsman first, then slash your way through the horde of the Urn Soldiers.

 
While you are dealing with the witch's minions, Hexe Marie will continuously cast her offensive spells at you, such as the Crow Swarm or Crow Barrage. These spells take almost a couple of seconds to hit your area, so it should buy you enough time to evade it by doing a back slide away from your location, and stay back until it is clear to attack again. After you clear all her minions, you can now re-engage with Hexe Marie and deal as much damage as you can. At this point, she may summon her minions again, and if she does, it is best to reconsider killing her minions, then dash forward and attack the witch again.

### Crimson Desert Trukan the Ascended Note, Tips & Trivia

 
 
 - Optional Boss: No
 
 - Trukan the Ascended only has one HP bar. Most of his attacks also have a chance of knocking down opponents.
 
 - Before combat, it is recommended to do preparation and bring a lot of HP recovery items. If you also have stashed a Palmar Pill, it may come handy incase you get slain in combat.
 
 - It is recommended to visit an Anvil and a Grind Stone if there is one nearby. This will help you get temporary buffs on your equipped armor and weapon, making your defense tougher and dealing more damage. You can check our Interactive Map for a list of Anvil and Gr

Taming Dragon

[...] the spears that are staked behind the dragon's back. There are a total of three spears that you need to remove.

### Taming Dragon Fight Strategy

 
This boss will be a strange encounter, because unlike the other bosses, you will need to save the life of this dragon. After you discover it in the grounds of Crimson Desert, it will fly and try to flee, maybe thinking that you are a threat. Your objective is to jump at the back of the flying dragon, and remove the mysterious spears that are staked at its back. You will have one opportunity to come aboard by jumping from the top of the Urdavah castle, and use your Flight and Axiom Force skills to get close and grab onto the dragon so you can ride its back.

Wolf Trackers is a Faction in Crimson Desert. Wolf Trackers is a hostile faction that travels in groups across Pywel, searching for prey.  Duke of Hernand and head of House Celeste. Once the royal line of the Kingdom of Hernand, House Celeste was stripped of the crown and reduced to a ducal house after its defeat in the war against Demeniss. Charles, a descendant of that fallen dynasty, now rules with quiet benevolence. He cares deeply for his subjects, earning the people's respect through his dignified and graceful conduct.

Shot Contest: Bow

[...] at the Lioncrest Manor, in which you have to compete with the region's best sharpshooters. [Crimson Desert Map Link]

### Crimson Desert Shot Contest: Bow Minigame Guide & How to Play

 
 
 - Refreshes in: There is no refresh time for this minigame. As long as you have enough currency to spend, you can always play this game. (Requires 80 Copper to Play)
 
 

Enjoy a quick game of Shot Contest: Bow - How to Play and Win "Shot Contest: Bow":

 
 
 - To play this game, you need to spend 80 Copper for every match.
 
 - One wooden target will randomly appear at a time.
 
 - You have to compete with one of the Sharpshooters and must hit the target first to score.
 
 - The first to shoot 10 wooden targets will be the winner of this minigame.

Shot Contest: Gun

[...] the Shot Contest: Gun minigame at the City of Hernand, which is near the Lioncrest Manor. [Crimson Desert Map Link]

### Crimson Desert Shot Contest: Gun Minigame Guide & How to Play

 
 
 - Refreshes in: There is no refresh time for this minigame. As long as you have enough currency to spend, you can always play this game. (Requires 1.00 Silver to Play)
 
 - Special Condition Notes: This game is exclusive to the Damiane.
 
 
Enjoy a quick game of Shot Contest: Gun - How to Play and Win "Shot Contest: Gun":

 
 
 - Test your shooting skills in a shot contest.
 
 - You need to spend 1.00 Silver to participate in this minigame.
 
 - Hold the button to withdraw your gun and aim, then release to fire.
 
 - Be the first to hit 10 randomly appearing targets to win.

Alden's Poster

### Alden's Poster

 
 
 
 Key Item 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Cannot Sell
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Alden, the provisioner of Hernand, is in need of help. 
Alden's Poster is a Key Item in Crimson Desert. Key Items are often used to progress the game's main campaign and complete NPC questlines. These items can be obtained from NPCs, rewarded from completing Quests, or by defeating Enemies or Bosses.

 Traverse through the various locations around Pywel and visit their settlements, liberate the strongholds, and participate in local Minigames. ### 
Crimson Desert Master Du Note, Tips & Trivia

- Optional Boss: No

- Master Du has two HP bars that you need to eliminate. He also has a very quick movement speed, which he can use to his advantage to evade your attacks and also strategically hit you with his offensive moves.

- It is recommended to stack up some HP recovery items while visiting a town through cooking and buying food items from merchant NPCs before going to Master Du's battle area in Cloister of Enlightenment. If you also have a stashed Palmar Pill, it is recommended to bring at least two of them incase you need to revive.

### 
Crimson Desert One Armed Ludvig Note, Tips & Trivia

- Optional Boss: No

- It is recommended that you pursue this quest using Oongka.

- There is only one battle phase for this encounter, where you will fight the One Armed Ludvig with one HP bar.

- It is recommended for you to use a spear against One Armed Ludvig for an increased attack range and quick attack speed.

- You can use offensive skills that has a chance of knocking down opponents, such as Lariat, Leg Sweep, or Clothesline.

### 
Pororin Forest Guardians

 A village hidden deep within the forest, shielded from the eyes.
The Shai and the Fadus live there in happiness among flowers that bloom throughout the year, yet sorrow marks its past. After a scholar, driven by greed upon hearing rumors of the village's mystery, attempted to abduct a Shai, its people sealed their gates and closed themselves off from the outside world.

Duo

[...] A combination that doesn't match any of the hands above, where the last digit of the sum of the two numbers is 0.

### 
Unique Combinations

- Warden
- A set formed with 4 and 9. Triggers a rematch if all other participants hold One-two or lower. The current pot remains for the next round.

- High Warden 
- Triggers a rematch if all other participants hold a 9 Pair or lower. The current pot remains for the next round.

- Judge 

- A set formed with 3 and 7. Achieves a special win if the strongest opponent hand is 9 Pair or lower. Otherwise, treated as Zero if there's no Pair present.

- Executor

### 
Shabby Horse Saddle

Horse Item
Horse Tack

Health: 25

 A travel saddle made of leather that has been softened and broken in by years of use. A worn quilted pad is tucked underneath - while it isn't exactly luxurious, it gets the job done for any mount.
Shabby Horse Saddle is a Horse Item in Crimson Desert. Horse Items are items that are specifically for your Horse mount, these items include consumables and gear for your horse.

A travel saddle made of leather that has been softened and broken in by years of use. A worn quilted pad is tucked underneath - while it isn't exactly luxurious, it gets the job done for any mount.

Spencer Pistol

Firearm

Attack 11

 A pistol crafted by House Spencer. While production was discontinued when the house fell, a few are said to still remain in private collections. It is one of the few remaining pieces of evidence showing that House Spencer once existed in the world.
